base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of zangief — a character from 1991 street fighter ii. Zangief — Spinning Piledriver (360+P) + Lariat. Grappler archetype. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
